tasks.title: Create organization documentation in Markdown
evidence: User requires organization documentation in Markdown viewable within the GitHub repo
Documentation should be repository-native (no custom web UI)
Ensure documentation covers configurable/customizable items with examples
AGENTS.md must be updated with reminder to keep documentation up to date when defaults or schemas change
plan: Create a Markdown documentation structure under docs/ suitable for GitHub viewing
Include comprehensive sections for all configuration options (global config, project config, CLI flags) with examples
Document high-level architecture and workflow without diving deep into non-configurable internals
Update README.md to link to the documentation index
Update AGENTS.md to add documentation maintenance reminders for defaults, schemas, and configuration changes
Run make ci to ensure build passes
tasks.request: Change RQ-0190 to create organization documentation in Markdown that is viewable within the GitHub repo. Focus on repository-native docs (no custom web UI), include all configurable/customizable items with examples, and update AGENTS.md to remind maintainers to keep docs current when defaults or schemas change.

tasks.title: Verify and consolidate refactored codebase
evidence: After refactoring large files, need to verify functionality and consolidate any redundant code
User request: 'Several files in this project are thousand of lines long. We need to refactor while maintaing the same functionality.'
plan: Run full test suite with make ci
Check for duplicate code across newly created modules
Consolidate any shared utilities that emerged during refactoring
Update module documentation (docstrings) for new modules
Verify all imports are clean and minimal
Check for any remaining files >800 lines that may need further splitting
Update CLAUDE.md if any project structure guidance changed
tasks.request: Several files in this project are thousand of lines long. We need to refactor while maintaing the same functionality. Smaller file sizes are easier to maintain and find what is needed. Also easier to make sure we are not violating DRY and YAGNI principals. Create several tasks to completely tackle this effort. use the queue fields at your disposal to ensure this is done logically.
